semantic.role: Define naming conventions for the codebase
responsibilities: Define interface naming prefix (must start with 'I') for TypeScript types
Define test file naming suffix (must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts) for test files
outOfScope: Other coding style rules (e.g., formatting, indentation)
Non-naming conventions (e.g., dependency management, comment styles)

English.purpose: Establish consistent naming conventions for interfaces and test files across the codebase.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for all developers working in the repository, particularly within a monorepo where style uniformity is critical for maintainability and readability. It serves as a governance rule set within the ArchSpine project.
key_takeaways: All internal TypeScript interfaces must be prefixed with 'I' (e.g., IUserRepository).
All test files must use the suffix .test.ts or .spec.ts for consistent test runner matching.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 为整个代码库建立统一的接口和测试文件命名规范。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 本文档面向仓库中的所有开发者，尤其适用于大型 monorepo 项目，在这种项目中，风格一致性对可维护性和可读性至关重要。它是 ArchSpine 项目治理规则的一部分。
key_takeaways: 所有内部 TypeScript 接口必须以 'I' 作为前缀（例如 IUserRepository）。
所有测试文件必须以 .test.ts 或 .spec.ts 作为后缀，以确保与测试运行器匹配一致。
